targets.rawSql: SELECT namespace, pod, ROUND(AVG(cpu_millicores)::numeric, 1) AS cpu_m_avg, ROUND(MAX(cpu_millicores)::numeric, 1) AS cpu_m_peak, ROUND(AVG(memory_mib)::numeric, 1) AS mem_mib_avg FROM (SELECT namespace, pod, SUM(cpu_millicores) AS cpu_millicores, SUM(memory_mib) AS memory_mib, time FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' GROUP BY namespace, pod, time) t GROUP BY namespace, pod ORDER BY cpu_m_avg DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 25

SELECT namespace, pod, ROUND(AVG(memory_mib)::numeric, 1) AS mem_mib_avg, ROUND(MAX(memory_mib)::numeric, 1) AS mem_mib_peak, ROUND(AVG(cpu_millicores)::numeric, 1) AS cpu_m_avg FROM (SELECT namespace, pod, SUM(cpu_millicores) AS cpu_millicores, SUM(memory_mib) AS memory_mib, time FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' GROUP BY namespace, pod, time) t GROUP BY namespace, pod ORDER BY mem_mib_avg DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 25

WITH top10 AS (SELECT namespace, pod FROM (SELECT namespace, pod, SUM(cpu_millicores) AS s FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' GROUP BY 1, 2) x ORDER BY s DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT date_trunc('minute', pr.time) AS time, pr.namespace || '/' || pr.pod AS metric, SUM(pr.cpu_millicores) AS value FROM pod_resource pr JOIN top10 USING (namespace, pod) WHERE $__timeFilter(pr.time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

WITH top10 AS (SELECT namespace, pod FROM (SELECT namespace, pod, SUM(memory_mib) AS s FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' GROUP BY 1, 2) x ORDER BY s DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT date_trunc('minute', pr.time) AS time, pr.namespace || '/' || pr.pod AS metric, SUM(pr.memory_mib) AS value FROM pod_resource pr JOIN top10 USING (namespace, pod) WHERE $__timeFilter(pr.time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
